Paints the histogram bars, scaling them logarithmically on the Y-axis to match the native ImageJ histogram look.

parseSliceRangeToSet(String, int) - Static method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.utils.InputUtils
Parses a slice range string (e.g. "1-3,5,8-10") and returns a set of valid 1-based slice indices.

Launches a dedicated background worker to apply the filter to the image (= stack).
performMedianPreviewAsync() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Handles the Median Filter preview, called after each toggle of the median filter preview checkbox.
